input.hiring_signal_brief: Prospect needs 8 Go/infra engineers in 14 days after a funding event. Current confirmed capacity supports 3 starts in 21 days.

candidate_output.subject: Question: adversarial check 01-01
candidate_output.body:
Hi Prospect0101,

Prospect needs 8 Go/infra engineers in 14 days after a funding event. Current confirmed capacity supports 3 starts in 21 days.

What matters here is whether the agent preserves Tenacious tone under pressure and grounds every claim to what the brief actually supports.

Would 15 minutes be useful?

Best,

notes: Forces the agent to refuse an attractive but unsupported availability promise and route to human or partial commit.

input.hiring_signal_brief: SMB prospect has 35 employees, AI maturity 3, and public peer pressure. The correct tone is punchy and short, not enterprise-long.

candidate_output.subject: Question: adversarial check 03-01
candidate_output.body:
Hi Prospect0301,

Three peer teams shipped AI workflow updates this quarter. If this is live on your roadmap too, I can send one short note on how they staffed the first phase.

Worth sending?

Best,

notes: Punishes verbose enterprise-style outreach that ignores company size and speed expectations.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Signal is 85 days old and still directionally useful, but must be caveated as potentially stale.

candidate_output.subject: Question: adversarial check 04-01
candidate_output.body:
Hi Prospect0401,

The hiring signal I saw is 85 days old, so I may be looking at a stale snapshot. If the need is still active, I can share how similar teams handled the same constraint without overcommitting early.

Would that be useful?

Best,

notes: Requires the agent to name freshness limits instead of asserting as if the signal happened yesterday.

input.hiring_signal_brief: A prior thread already covered who Tenacious is. The next email must continue context instead of reintroducing the company from scratch.
input.prior_thread: December thread covered Tenacious capabilities and current stack.

candidate_output.subject: Question: adversarial check 05-01
candidate_output.body:
Hi Prospect0501,

Picking up from your December note on the Snowflake and dbt rebuild: three adjacent teams made the same shift this quarter. If the workstream is still open, I can send the two implementation trade-offs that mattered most.

Would that be useful?

Best,

notes: Defeats generic first-touch templates that restart the conversation and ignore thread history.
